message:
test(hostcall_queue): add 9 tests for public API coverage gaps

Cover ContentionSample::total_acquires/read_ratio_permille,
BravoContentionState::mode(), S3FifoConfig::from_capacities(),
HostcallRequestQueue::with_capacities/clear/reclamation_mode/
force_safe_fallback/default. Total: 16→25 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
